channel.title: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament
channel.description: All Registered Polls for the European Parliament

item.title: Opinion Poll by YouGov, 10–13 July 2026 – Seat Projections for the Parties
item.description:
• Sozialdemokratische Partei Deutschlands (S&D): 10–13 seats
  • Die PARTEI (NI): 0–1 seats
  • Partei Mensch Klima Tierschutz (GUE/NGL): 1–2 seats
  • Basisdemokratische Partei Deutschland (*): 0–1 seats
  • Alternative für Deutschland (ESN): 23–28 seats
  • Bündnis Sahra Wagenknecht (NI): 3–5 seats
  • Die Linke (GUE/NGL): 10–13 seats
  • Christlich Demokratische Union Deutschlands (EPP): 13–17 seats
  • Christlich-Soziale Union in Bayern (EPP): 3–5 seats
  • Bündnis 90/Die Grünen (Greens/EFA): 12–15 seats
  • Freie Wähler (RE): 1–3 seats
  • Volt Europa (Greens/EFA): 0–2 seats
  • Freie Demokratische Partei (RE): 4–6 seats
